name: 14th Street Y
description: Come play pickleball at 14th Street Y in New York, NY! There are 2 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons. A one-time fee is required to play.
open_play_schedule: Tuesday & Friday beginner classes and court rentals
fees: Fee required — Member and non-member pricing

name: 92nd Street Y
description: Come play pickleball at 92nd Street Y in New York, NY! There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

description: Alfred E. Smith Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in New York, NY. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Alley Pond Park
description:
Restrooms are located at the Commonpoint Alley Pond Tennis Center office.

Courts usually operate 2OFF/2ON. 

Queue paddles next to each court for next game. 

For best results, ask before queuing if you don't know the players, as the Open Play rotation is voluntary and not run by an organizer/Parks.
open_play_schedule: Courts are most active 9AM-12PM and after 4PM. Levels usually range from Intermediate (3.0) to Advanced (4.0).

name: Asser Levy Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Asser Levy Recreation Center in New York, NY! There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. The court is free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Brandeis High School
description:
SUNDAY PICKLEBALL

No Painted Lines. We Use Rubber Markers.


Participants of various skill levels can select from a variety of choices, with each option tailored to specific courts and scheduled times. 

https://www.nyurban.com/open-play-pickleball/


Online Sign Up Only, You will be on our List but bring your receipt.  
 Bring Your Paddle
fees:
Fee required — Pay per timeslot:

$15 per person. 6 players per court.
*$10 for the 5:30 Session 1.5 hours
 
Option to Reserve Your Own Court & Bring Up to 8 Friends!!!

name: Brooklyn Bridge Park Pier 2
description: Equipment for pickleball can be borrowed from the roller rink (an ID card is held as collateral).

name: Carl Schurz Park Pickleball Courts
description: Carl Schurz Park Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in New York, NY. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.
open_play_schedule: Generally nets are up from sunrise to sunset, weather permitting. Free open play for all levels., 4 off/4 on. A tag on each stack of paddles indicates the level of the players in that stack. Put your paddle in a stack of 3 or less that is at your level.

name: Center at West Park
description: Located on the third floor in the landmark West Park Presbyterian Church Building, this air conditioned private pickle ball court is the perfect place to have a game or take some lessons.
fees: Private — Rates located on our website

name: Commonpoint Queens Tennis and Athletic Center at Alley Pond
description: Come play pickleball at Commonpoint Queens Tennis and Athletic Center at Alley Pond in Queens Village,  NY! During the winter indoor season (October to April) there are 6  Pickleball courts. Of the 6 courts, 2 are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets, the additional 4 are converted tennis courts. Our indoor bubble is temperature controlled.   Reservations are available for seasonal courts and daily court rentals. There is a fee to rent the courts. Please visit our website for more information about court rentals, open play, clinics and leagues. Players have access to restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons.

name: SPORTIME Randall's Island / JMTA New York City
description:
SPORTIME RANDALL'S ISLAND is the NYC Metro Area's premier tennis destination and is the flagship home of the John McEnroe Tennis Academy.  Sportime Randall's Island will be the NYC Metro Area's premier indoor pickleball destination as well! Court-time rentals, instructional clinics, social and competitive open play sessions, seasonal courts, events and more will all be on the menu for the hundreds of thousands of City residents who have become part of the pickleball craze! 

Heading this new effort is Lisa Scotti, our Director of Pickleball. Email her at lscotti@sportimeny.com or call 212-427-6150 to get started!
